title: Example rulesets and documentation
description:
Demonstrate the bracket on two hierarchies and document it: an SDD example (epic) and a research example (goal, no epic), plus concept and how-to docs.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] The bracket is demonstrated end-to-end on the SDD example, blocking an uncovered criterion at the breakdown gate.
- [ ] The bracket is demonstrated on a non-epic hierarchy, proving domain-agnosticism.
- [ ] Concept and how-to documentation explain the spine, the two gates, and adoption.
